rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §45.305 governs private matching funds for a credit enhancement program and use of state funds. It does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraised value.
quote: The commissioner may not implement the program unless private funds in an amount at least equal to the amount of state funds allocated under Section 45.304 are obligated to the program for at least the first 10 years of the term of obligations for which credit enhancement is provided under the program.
_note: No direct relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this credit enhancement matching-fund provision.
